channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Murphy Slams Trump Over Meme Coin Launch, Calls It 'Biggest White House Corruption in a Century'
item.description: Sen. Chris Murphy (D-Conn.) criticizes President Trump for launching a meme coin, suggesting it may be the biggest White House corruption in a century. The Connecticut Democrat argues that Trump's move is a pure grift and could be used to buy his favor.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
